operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote status fields and exchange readiness indicators
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Tote status view shows init reason, current task, exchange type/priority, readiness for exchange, whether an AUV is behind it, station, sorter task UID, task name (e.g., pickup tote), errors, and tote ID.
observed_evidence: tote status of why it wasn't initialized
shows the current task and what kind of exchange type ... if it's ready for exchange
if there's an AUV behind it ... what stations it's at ... sorter task UID ... any error ... the tote ID
relationships: tote -> task: current task and exchange type
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tote status view includes: init reason, current task, exchange type/priority, exchange readiness, AUV behind, station, sorter task UID, task name (pickup tote), errors, tote ID.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Exchange thresholds and calculation methods
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Exchange settings use thresholds for queue, pickup, priority, and close (e.g., 60/70/80%). Methods can be counts, cube, or a mix. Customers can update, but values are typically finalized with the UPS project team at the end of UAT.
observed_evidence: you have a queue, a pick up, a priority and a close ... sixty 70 80%
software has the ability to do it based off counts ... method is either counts cube or cube and counts
updated by the customer ... finalize it with the project team with UPS at the end of UAT
relationships: thresholds -> stages: queue | pickup | priority | close
governance -> thresholds: customer update; finalized end of UAT
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Exchange thresholds: queue, pickup, priority, close (e.g., 60/70/80%). Methods: counts, cube, or both. Customer can update; typically finalized with UPS project team at end of UAT.
